titleStmt.title: SII 26.425: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 425. (A.R. No. 404 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king, commencing with Pūmēvu vaḷar tiruppoṉmādu puṇara, etc., and mentions the queen Buvaṉamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ.

It records a gift, made by the king and executed by Tribhuvanachakravatti Kōnēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ, of 10 vēli of land as tax-free dēvadāna in Āḍaṟpāḍi alias [Kāma]vāṉavan-mādiripuram in Kūḍal in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, for tiruppaḍimāṟṟu and other services in the temple of the god Tiruppulīśvaramahādēvar of Siṟṟiṅgūr in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu. A certain Villavarayaṉ figures as the signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
..pūmevuvaḷar tiruppoṉmātu puṇara nāmevu kalaikaḷ nalam peritu ciṟappa vijaiyamāmakaḷ velpuyat tiruppayicaiyin celviyum Eṇṭicai viḷaṅka nirupar van=tiṟaiñca ninilamaṭantaiyait tirumaṇam pu[ ṇarntu] cirvaḷar taruma maṇimuṭi kavitteṉa maṇimuṭicūṭi mallai ñālattu palluyiṟkellā mellai yiliṉpam kaviṉteyti veṇkuṭai niḻaṟkiḻc ceṅkolocci vāḻipallūḻi Āḻinaṭappa
cempoṉ virasiṁhāsanattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyā(ḷ)ḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāna tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu munṟāvatu prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi tribhuvanacakravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ jananātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu ciṟṟiṅkūr tiruppuliśvaramuṭaiya mahādevar koyilil tevakaṉmikaḷukkum śrīmāheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārka
ḷukkum Itdevaṟku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka rājarājavaḷanāṭṭuk kūṭalilāṭaṟpāṭiyāna kāmavāṉavaṉamātiripuratti niṉṟum � Iṟukkiṟa kalam rānattattukku vaṭakku nirnilattu Orupakkamaṭaiyap patiṟṟuveli nila muṉṟāvatu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Āka Iṭṭu variyilārum varikkukkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvari potakkāṭṭac coṉṉom Innilam patiṟṟu veliyuṅ kaikkoṇṭu tiruppaṭimā
ṟṟu celuttuka Ivai villavarayaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 3 100 � 9 10 Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 26.425 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
